task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

content.content:
budget_vs_actuals_q2.xlsx
client_onboarding_email_draft.txt
helios_api_endpoints.txt

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment - Meridian Group & NovaBridge

Dear Priya,

Welcome to the Project Helios integration environment! On behalf of the entire NovaBridge team, we are thrilled to partner with you and the Meridian Group on this initiative. 

As Meridian's IT Lead, we know that reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT are top priorities for you and your team. Project Helios is designed specifically to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. We are confident that this platform will provide you with the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

Within the next 24 hours, you will receive a separate email containing your secure access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation. 

To keep our integration timeline on track, please note the following key milestones:
1. Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup by July 12, 2026.
2. UAT Access: We kindly request your team to provision UAT environment access by July 19, 2026.
3. Stakeholder Demo: We will work together to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of our upcoming stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

We are fully committed to supporting you through every step of this process. For any technical inquiries, please feel free to reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or general questions, I will be your primary point of contact.

We look forward to a highly successful collaboration with you and the Meridian IT team. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything in the meantime.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have found the email draft (`client_onboarding_email_draft.txt`), reviewed it, and updated it to have a more personalized and professional tone. 

The revised draft addresses Priya by name and her role as Meridian's IT Lead, highlights the alignment of the Helios platform with her team's priorities, and clearly formats the next steps and technical contacts. The improved version has been saved back directly to the same file in the sandbox. Let me know if you would like me to make any additional tweaks!
